Video automation MVP

自动剪辑、视频翻译、英文配音和字幕，一站式网页工作台

This starter turns your approved plan into a browser-first product shell: queue video jobs, configure automated editing rules, and prepare a worker pipeline for English subtitles and AI dubbing.

4-step
pipeline

Transcribe → translate → dub → render

2 modes
auto edit

Subtitle-driven trimming + template rendering

Web-first
delivery

Cloud-deployable UI with async worker processing

Create a processing job

Upload a source video

This version uploads a real video file, queues the task in Redis, and lets the background worker process it asynchronously.

Clip rules

Dub + subtitle settings

Current mode

Use subtitle-aware trimming first, then render with a template.

Target output: English subtitles + English AI voice track.

Queued jobs

Processing dashboard

Task details now live in PostgreSQL, while Redis handles background queue delivery.

No tasks yet. Create your first media job above.
